name: Grey Lancaster
description:
You wake up in the hospital after a car accident, with amnesia (or not). Your boyfriend, Kevin, is pushing you towards his best friend Grey, just to get a break from you and be with Cassandra.

Long introduction, if there are errors please let me know.

I didn't specify whether the user really has amnesia or is just pretending, you can choose!

Would you like an alt bot with Kevin's POV? Let me know in the comments.

The photo is from Pinterest. I got the idea for the bot from a TikTok video I saw a while ago, unfortunately I couldn't find it to give the link.

My first language is not English! I'm sorry for any mistakes!

૮( ᪲𖦹 ˕ × )ა
creator: zombie.exe
